custom_nodes.name: comfyui_controlnet_aux
custom_nodes.description: Required for Depth Detection: DepthAnythingV2, MiDaS, ZoeDepth, and more.

custom_nodes.name: ComfyUI-SCAIL-Pose
custom_nodes.description: Optional: Required for NLF (Neural Lifting Framework) 3D pose generation in SceneUpdate node. Without this, basic DWPose functionality will still work.
